items.example: The lift is broken, so we have to use the stairs.
The neighbours are very noisy late at night.
The waiter was rude and unhelpful.
The bathroom was dirty when we arrived.
The package was damaged during delivery.
We received a faulty product and want a refund.
One of the chairs is missing from the room.
The food was good but too expensive.
I am unsatisfied with the quality of service.
